meta.title: UU Wellesley Hills — A Welcoming Unitarian Universalist Congregation
meta.description: Unitarian Universalist Society in Wellesley Hills, MA. Our only creed is love. Join us for Sunday worship, music, and community.

banner.text: Summer services have begun — join us Sundays at 10:30am.

hero.heading: A community of faith in Wellesley Hills

nextService.label: Next Service
nextService.title: Sunday Worship
nextService.details: Led by Rev. Mark Robel; preaching by Rev. Mel Pace.

fellowship.title: Fellowship Hour
fellowship.text: Join us on Zoom after Sunday worship for coffee and conversation.

welcome.heading: Building a community of faith
welcome.body: We are a Unitarian Universalist congregation that inspires spiritual growth and just, responsible action. Wherever you are on your journey, you are welcome here — to question, to wonder, and to belong.

values.heading: Our Shared Values
values.body: Love is at the center of our faith, surrounded by interdependence, pluralism, justice, transformation, generosity, and equity — the UU Shared Values adopted in June 2024.
